reviews.author: Gabriel Cardi
reviews.text: Best activity in Vietnam. They let you play with the ducks! Super ethic, they give a little class first. When you're done they give you a taste of local fresh food. Only for 100k vnd, amazing. They don't try to sell you terrible quality Souvenirs like in the cities. Really enjoyed it.

reviews.author: Rick Jardon
reviews.text: I usually avoid really touristy activities but this was very unique and fun and I never felt trapped. It was reasonably priced. Run by a family that were super nice and never pushy, we enjoyed it a lot. The ride out there was beautiful on our scooter. Well worth going.

reviews.author: Leo van Galen
reviews.text: Staff are all so friendly!! We had a great time at the duck stop, such a fun experience. You get to see the ducks for about 10 minutes, feed them and get lots of photos. They provide you with shoes so yours don’t get wet/dirty, they help wash your feet and hands after too which was nice. The 100k package (only package) includes a crispy pancake roll with peanut sauce, which was absolutely delicious - we had to get some more! You get a drink included too so we both got a beer. You can pay a bit more to get a photo on the water buffalo but we didn’t do this. Highly recommend if you are staying in or near Phong Nha, it was dry for us but definitely something you can do if it’s raining!

reviews.author: Mihaela Pletea
reviews.text: It an amazing and unique experience. The staff speak really good English, they were most welcoming and helpful and they made sure we had an amazing experience. They even offered us complementary Vietnamese pancakes and tea. This is THE place to go and have the best fun. Don't miss out on this amazing and one of a kind adventure.

reviews.author: Thai Gennaro
reviews.text: This is such an amazing experience and is the original place to go to see the ducks! You dont need to book an overpriced tour, get a grab or bike here and pay 100K for the experience, delicious traditional pancakes and a beer or soft drink. The team here are so friendly and fun and super kind! You have to visit this place if you come to Phong Nha and it is worth coming to Phong Nha just for this place. It has been one of my favourite experiences in South East Asia.

reviews.author: Aidan & Marybeth
reviews.text: Came to Phong Nha for the ducks, and they did not disappoint. Such a great and funny experience, it is clear that the workers care for the ducks and are very friendly 🙂 We went here as apart of a full day tour but you are able to just bike/get a taxi here. It costs 150,000 for the full experience of duck feeding, buffalo feeding/riding (we opted out of the riding), fishing, and a small meal of fruit and spring rolls. We would really recommend if you are in the area to do this duck stop and don't wait for the one in ninh binh - this is the better one! Important-If you are wanting to mimic the videos you see on TikTok we would recommend coming by yourself and not part of a group 🙂

reviews.author: Dallas Nelson
reviews.text: Amazing place ! Staff were incredible. Very ethical as opposed to what some whiny reviews say. The ducks have tons of space, seem very happy and taken care of. The meal included was also delicious.

reviews.author: Darcey Brown
reviews.text: This was one of the best experiences we have done in Vietnam. Everyone is so friendly and the price for what you get is amazing! The ducks are so loved and taken care of which is so important, it is such a fun experience and you get some great photos from it too. Definitely recommend coming to this one as it’s the original place for it so the service is even better!!

reviews.author: Zinnia Xu
reviews.text: Very fun side quest excursion to play with some cute ducks! The owners have some silly ways of feeding the ducks and some fun photos. An enjoyable experience. We came late afternoon without a tour group on our own and they were open and let us see the ducks immediately. We took a grab over, would recommend having a prepared Grab ride back as Grab drivers don’t often go out there. Our Grab driver offered to wait for us and take us back to our hotel for roughly the same price.

reviews.author: Amy Hudson
reviews.text: We had an awesome time at the duck stop, starting with some information about some of the fruit/vege trees they have before going down to the duck area, where you get to feed the ducks and be a duck leader. There are plenty of photo opportunities and the guide was great fun. You then come back and wash your hands and feet before you get a Vietnamese pancake and cold beer or coke. Highly recommend to anyone, Greta fun and all for 100k!

reviews.author: Lara Hough
reviews.text: The original duck stop is far better than all the copies! The guides and personal experience is so amazing and they really make sure you have an amazing time! Trang was very knowledgeable and so kind teaching us about all of the plants and vegetables they grow before we were taken to do the duck leading in our private group! Must do experience , highlight of our trip for sure!

reviews.author: Nathan Wells
reviews.text: We came during the lunar new year so everything is closed apart from here. It was 70 vnd per person. The experience was amazing. It was about 30 minutes but so much fun! Haven’t laughed so much! They even gave us food after the experience which is so nice of them considering it’s one of their only days off in the year! Totally worth the trip!

reviews.author: Lenna
reviews.text: An absolute blast! We were not expecting how great of an experience the duck farm was. Our guide was incredible and hilarious. I don’t think we’ve laughed that hard ever. They took great photos and knew how to get the ducks to pose with us. You get a banh xeo with the price of admission and it was absolutely delicious. We will 100% be back the next time we come to Vietnam.

reviews.author: גליה שחם
reviews.text: A wonderful experience! We were warmly welcomed with a cold drink, and a smile. and for a small charge, enjoyed a truly special adventure. We learned about the farm’s tree, and had a fun and laugh a lot with lovely Ring and the ducks Everything is done with true love for animals and people. Highly recommended! Special thanks to Ring 🦆 Shimon & Galia

reviews.author: Kevin Kerschbaum
reviews.text: Such a funny and unique stop! We had no idea what to expect, but we ended up at a super friendly family-run place. It’s 100,000 per person, including a drink and some food. You change into different shoes and off you go. We had a great time, and the ducks are clearly well cared for by the family. A fun experience from start to finish! Afterwards you wash up and leave with a hilarious story to tell. Feeding ducks, having fun, and supporting the family – a perfect win-win! Kevin & Lisa from 🇩🇪

reviews.author: Josefina Andrén
reviews.text: So much fun! Looked like the ducks are treated well, they could go around big areas and swim. 100k/person you got drink, viet pancake and the duck experience! Wear shorts😂

reviews.author: Felicity Heath
reviews.text: We had the BEST time at the duck stop! Such a funny, unique experience! Everyone was so friendly and made the experience so enjoyable. So reasonably priced and the food was amazing! Definitely an unforgettable experience…! Also, really fun to cycle there from town, pretty flat most of the way and easy to navigate!

reviews.author: Isabella Pileggi
reviews.text: Such an interesting and fun experience. I genuinely havent laughed that hard in awhile. The staff were so friendly and welcoming. We learned how to be a "duck leader" 🤣 and they took tons of photos for us followed by a delicious meal !! Thanks so much for a wonderful start to the new year!!!

reviews.author: Grace Davies
reviews.text: The funniest experience EVER! We laughed the whole time - our leader was hilarious and a great dancer!! The photos he took were priceless. The Vietnamese pancake afterwards was so delicious and such great value ☺️ we came to Phong Nha specifically for this and it definitely lived up to expectations. Would also recommend going late arvo - not too busy & the sunset was lovely.

reviews.author: Lily Chate
reviews.text: Such a fun activity. The duck leader was funny too. They also give you crispy pancake afterwards which were very delicious. So good for only 100000 VND (£2.80ish)

reviews.author: Hannah Salatielu
reviews.text: I did not expect this to be as fun as it was - I grinned the entire time and was almost in tears of laughter at some points. The staff are very kind and great at bringing the experience to life. Would be great with kids, but we went as three adults and still had a blast. 10/10 experience. Only thing to note is that Grab/Uber doesn’t really pick up from this area, so you may need to pay your Grab driver to wait for you and then drive you back (still very reasonable price).

reviews.author: Ben Harper
reviews.text: What an amazing experience, I have not had that much fun or laughed that hard for a long time. The owner and guide around the farm was so friendly and really made sure you had a fun time. All the ducks were free to do what they wanted and were really cute. This is such a unique thing to do and I can’t recommend it enough. What’s even better is that to do the duck experience and see Donald Trump the water buffalo (who is super cute by the way) was 150k. We had a quick tour of the farm too then pancakes which were really tasty. They gave us extra water because it was hot which is really appreciated. All this was included in the price! Really this should cost more! Make sure you get the original one and not one of the copies that have popped up! Thank you Duck Stop!!

reviews.author: Esther H.
reviews.text: I had so much fun at the duck stop! 😍 the ducks and the waterbuffalo seem to be well taken care of, and the duck leader really makes a whole show out of it, which really enriches the experience! He also took great photos and videos! 👌🏻 It was the best money (only 150.000 dong) I ever spend!

reviews.author: KC & Mar
reviews.text: Many animal-tourism experiences over here are pretty shitty for the animals, so we were unsure about going - but so glad we did! Duck Stop really surprised us. For 100k per person you get a small snack and a drink, and the hosts hang out and chat with you. Their English was excellent and they were very personable and friendly. The actual Duck experience was great. I don't want to spoil it, but you will get messy. The Ducks seemed very well cared for and happy. Well fed, lots of space to hang out, both land and water. And so much food for them. Definitely some happy Ducks

reviews.author: Grant Humphries
reviews.text: This is a MUST do in Vietnam, it’s so fun, the guys who own / work there make it a really fun experience. Great experience for the price. includes some spring rolls, a drink, wet shoes and a towel to wash your feet / hands off after. I would rate 6 stars if I could!

reviews.author: Ana Fernandez
reviews.text: I had the funniest and most wonderful adventure here! The whole experience was so much fun — I laughed so much. The ducks came to us, ate from our hands, and even followed us around. They were absolutely adorable! The guys from the farm were so welcoming and helpful. At first, I was too scared to feed the ducks, but one of the staff stayed with me the whole time and made the experience truly memorable. I recommend this 1000%! And don’t even get me started on the pancakes at the end — so delicious! Plus, the buffalo was the cherry on top of the cake. I would do this again and again. You must try it!

reviews.author: Sarah Grund
reviews.text: It was such a fun experience to be a duck leader! I also thought it was nice how they included a snack and a beer in the price per person. Loved the ducks 🪿

reviews.author: Amelie Murphy-Brown
reviews.text: We had an amazing experience. We were shown around the farm and taught about different plants by a very friendly and lovely young woman. We then went and met the ducks, which was such a funny positive experience. We got lots of pictures and photos and just had an overall great time. We then were taught to make veggie spring rolls and were given a drink. All of this cost 100,000 dong (£2.78) per person. Great experience would definitely recommend.

reviews.author: Alaina LaFountain
reviews.text: We had an absolute blast playing with all the ducks, they were so cute and friendly! The family that runs it was incredibly kind and welcoming. At the end, they even gave us a delicious snack made fresh from ingredients grown right on their farm. Highly recommend!

reviews.author: Brooke Watson
reviews.text: So much fun. Before you see the ducks you go on a mini farm tour, was cute! The main worker who takes you to the ducks was so funny and entertaining. You get to play with the ducks and feed them, you get give shoes so yours don’t get eaten by the ducks haha. Then a clean off and you have lunch included all for 100K. This was such a fun and cute experience.
